title: SinoCore
body:
> 青，取之于蓝，而青于蓝；冰，水为之，而寒于水。  
> Although blue comes from the indigo plant, it is bluer than indigo;  
> and ice is made of water, but it is colder than water.

华夏系列核心代码库。华夏系列模组的必要前置。  
The required library of SinoSeries mods. (SinoBrush, SinoDeco, etc.)

提供了类似 Architectury API 的功能，参考开发文档 [https://docs.sino.moegirl.games/](https://docs.sino.moegirl.games/)。  
This library provides functions like Architectury API, refer our document [https://docs.sino.moegirl.games/](https://docs.sino.moegirl.games/).
